# `vbmClearColor`

**Systems:** VIC20  
**Parameters:** `b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>vbmClearColor( [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte] - value to use to clear the color memory.</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Clears the foreground colour memory with the given color value.
</p>

<h3>Example</h3>
<code>
    vbmSetScreenMode( 0 );

    vbmClear( 255 ); // clears the bitmap with solid pixels

    vbmClearColor( GREEN ); // sets the colour of the bitmap to green
</code>

</div>
